name: codex-touchbar-usage
description: Show Codex quota, reset cards, and token usage on a MacBook Touch Bar through a native macOS helper.

interface.shortDescription: Show Codex quota and reset cards on the MacBook Touch Bar.
interface.longDescription: Codex Touch Bar Usage installs a lightweight native macOS helper that reads official Codex quota, reset-card availability, reset times, and account token usage, then renders them on Touch Bar only while Codex is frontmost.
defaultPrompt: Install the Codex Touch Bar usage helper.
Check my Codex usage helper status.
